---
title: "My Presentation"
subtitle: "Quarto slides course, practice deck"
author: "Your Name"
date: last-modified
format:
  beamer:
    aspectratio: 169
execute:
  echo: false
---

<!--
Practice file for the "Building Slides with Quarto" session.

Build this up slide by slide as we go through quarto-slides-course.qmd.
Render often with:

    quarto render student-starter.qmd

Handy paths already available in this repository, for the exercises:
  - images/logo.png        (static image insertion)
  - R/shared-results.R      (source() + a shared figure/table)
  - example.bib             (citations, e.g. [@Moher2010])

When you get to "Using this for your own defense," you can switch from
this scratch file to copying slides.qmd instead, which already has the
UM6SS branding (slides-in-header.tex) wired in.
-->

## My first slide

Start here.
